title: 4D Rendering System (4DRS) v1.0.0
description: RT4D (Ray Tracer for Four Dimensions) — 4D path-tracing modules for math, geometry, materials, integration/transport, acceleration, and projection, plus the official Hyper-Caustic Lens validation scene. This release packages the v1.0 specification, architecture, API freeze, validation baseline, and First 4D Renderer technical note. Capability claims are evidence-tagged in constitution/CHARTER.md (RT4D API freeze and baseline are partial; scene factory and docs are enforced where listed).
notes: Validation baseline under docs/4drs/validation/baseline.json and docs/4drs/validation/artifacts/. Regenerate with: npm run render:hcl-baseline. Module barrels: math, geometry, material, integrator, accel, output, scene (see docs/4drs/api/rt4d-v1.0-freeze.md).
